spec.name: A Small Path In The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the dense forest. The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination. The path continues to the west and south.

west.description: The small path leads west through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
